name: RPG Politics 2
description: RPG civilization mod for Minecraft 26.2: enlarged vanilla villages with revamped datapack structures, village government overlay, Hypixel Skyblock-style combat stats and tooltips, unique RIGHT CLICK gear abilities, JJK cursed energy and techniques, elected politics, economy, and Fallout-style villager dialogue.

custom.politicalserver:note: Do NOT drop legacy 1.16.5 NotEnoughAnimations / TRansition / TRender jars in mods — use 26.2 builds only if installing optional enhancements.
